texto: They did not kill Hunger, for people were made to always want new things to taste. They did not destroy Poverty, for poverty reminds us to be humble. They did not destroy Sleep, for people sometimes need to forget their troubles and restore their energy. And they did not defeat Old Age, for there must always be room for the new people being born.
explicacao: Orientação direta de James Bruchac & Joseph Bruchac sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “They did not kill Hunger, for people were made to always want new things to taste. They did not d…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, forgetting-your-worries, humility, útil em momentos de humility e hunger.
